types.description: Unique accessibility node identifier.
Enum of possible property types.
Enum of possible property sources.
Enum of possible native property sources (as a subtype of a particular AXValueSourceType).
A single source for a computed AX property.

properties.name: type
properties.description: What type of source this is.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of this property source.

properties.name: attribute
properties.description: The name of the relevant attribute, if any.

properties.name: attributeValue
properties.description: The value of the relevant attribute, if any.

properties.name: superseded
properties.description: Whether this source is superseded by a higher priority source.

properties.name: nativeSource
properties.description: The native markup source for this value, e.g. a `<label>` element.

properties.name: nativeSourceValue
properties.description: The value, such as a node or node list, of the native source.

properties.name: invalid
properties.description: Whether the value for this property is invalid.

properties.name: invalidReason
properties.description: Reason for the value being invalid, if it is.

properties.name: backendDOMNodeId
properties.description: The BackendNodeId of the related DOM node.

properties.name: idref
properties.description: The IDRef value provided, if any.

properties.name: text
properties.description: The text alternative of this node in the current context.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of this property.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of this property.

types.description: A single computed AX property.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The type of this value.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The computed value of this property.

properties.name: relatedNodes
properties.description: One or more related nodes, if applicable.

properties.name: sources
properties.description: The sources which contributed to the computation of this property.

types.description:
Values of AXProperty name:
- from 'busy' to 'roledescription': states which apply to every AX node
- from 'live' to 'root': attributes which apply to nodes in live regions
- from 'autocomplete' to 'valuetext': attributes which apply to widgets
- from 'checked' to 'selected': states which apply to widgets
- from 'activedescendant' to 'owns': relationships between elements other than parent/child/sibling
- from 'activeFullscreenElement' to 'uninteresting': reasons why this noode is hidden
A node in the accessibility tree.

properties.name: nodeId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this node.

properties.name: ignored
properties.description: Whether this node is ignored for accessibility

properties.name: ignoredReasons
properties.description: Collection of reasons why this node is hidden.

properties.name: role
properties.description: This `Node`'s role, whether explicit or implicit.

properties.name: chromeRole
properties.description: This `Node`'s Chrome raw role.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The accessible name for this `Node`.

properties.name: description
properties.description: The accessible description for this `Node`.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value for this `Node`.

properties.name: properties
properties.description: All other properties

properties.name: parentId
properties.description: ID for this node's parent.

properties.name: childIds
properties.description: IDs for each of this node's child nodes.

properties.name: backendDOMNodeId
properties.description: The backend ID for the associated DOM node, if any.

properties.name: frameId
properties.description: The frame ID for the frame associated with this nodes document.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables the accessibility domain.

commands.name: enable
commands.description:
Enables the accessibility domain which causes `AXNodeId`s to remain consistent between method calls.
This turns on accessibility for the page, which can impact performance until accessibility is disabled.

commands.name: getPartialAXTree
commands.description: Fetches the accessibility node and partial accessibility tree for this DOM node, if it exists.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the node to get the partial accessibility tree for.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the backend node to get the partial accessibility tree for.

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: JavaScript object id of the node wrapper to get the partial accessibility tree for.

parameters.name: fetchRelatives
parameters.description: Whether to fetch this node's ancestors, siblings and children. Defaults to true.

returns.name: nodes
returns.description:
The `Accessibility.AXNode` for this DOM node, if it exists, plus its ancestors, siblings and
children, if requested.

commands.name: getFullAXTree
commands.description: Fetches the entire accessibility tree for the root Document

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description:
The maximum depth at which descendants of the root node should be retrieved.
If omitted, the full tree is returned.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description:
The frame for whose document the AX tree should be retrieved.
If omitted, the root frame is used.

commands.name: getRootAXNode
commands.description:
Fetches the root node.
Requires `enable()` to have been called previously.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description:
The frame in whose document the node resides.
If omitted, the root frame is used.

commands.name: getAXNodeAndAncestors
commands.description:
Fetches a node and all ancestors up to and including the root.
Requires `enable()` to have been called previously.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the node to get.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the backend node to get.

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: JavaScript object id of the node wrapper to get.

commands.name: getChildAXNodes
commands.description:
Fetches a particular accessibility node by AXNodeId.
Requires `enable()` to have been called previously.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description:
The frame in whose document the node resides.
If omitted, the root frame is used.

commands.name: queryAXTree
commands.description:
Query a DOM node's accessibility subtree for accessible name and role.
This command computes the name and role for all nodes in the subtree, including those that are
ignored for accessibility, and returns those that match the specified name and role. If no DOM
node is specified, or the DOM node does not exist, the command returns an error. If neither
`accessibleName` or `role` is specified, it returns all the accessibility nodes in the subtree.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the node for the root to query.

parameters.name: backendNodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the backend node for the root to query.

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: JavaScript object id of the node wrapper for the root to query.

parameters.name: accessibleName
parameters.description: Find nodes with this computed name.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Find nodes with this computed role.

returns.name: nodes
returns.description:
A list of `Accessibility.AXNode` matching the specified attributes,
including nodes that are ignored for accessibility.

events.name: loadComplete
events.description:
The loadComplete event mirrors the load complete event sent by the browser to assistive
technology when the web page has finished loading.

parameters.name: root
parameters.description: New document root node.

events.name: nodesUpdated
events.description: The nodesUpdated event is sent every time a previously requested node has changed the in tree.

parameters.name: nodes
parameters.description: Updated node data.

types.description: Animation instance.

properties.name: id
properties.description: `Animation`'s id.

properties.name: name
properties.description: `Animation`'s name.

properties.name: pausedState
properties.description: `Animation`'s internal paused state.

properties.name: playState
properties.description: `Animation`'s play state.

properties.name: playbackRate
properties.description: `Animation`'s playback rate.

properties.name: startTime
properties.description:
`Animation`'s start time.
Milliseconds for time based animations and
percentage [0 - 100] for scroll driven animations
(i.e. when viewOrScrollTimeline exists).

properties.name: currentTime
properties.description: `Animation`'s current time.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Animation type of `Animation`.

properties.name: source
properties.description: `Animation`'s source animation node.

properties.name: cssId
properties.description:
A unique ID for `Animation` representing the sources that triggered this CSS
animation/transition.

properties.name: viewOrScrollTimeline
properties.description: View or scroll timeline

types.description: Timeline instance

properties.name: sourceNodeId
properties.description: Scroll container node

properties.name: startOffset
properties.description:
Represents the starting scroll position of the timeline
as a length offset in pixels from scroll origin.

properties.name: endOffset
properties.description:
Represents the ending scroll position of the timeline
as a length offset in pixels from scroll origin.

properties.name: subjectNodeId
properties.description:
The element whose principal box's visibility in the
scrollport defined the progress of the timeline.
Does not exist for animations with ScrollTimeline

properties.name: axis
properties.description: Orientation of the scroll

types.description: AnimationEffect instance

properties.name: delay
properties.description: `AnimationEffect`'s delay.

properties.name: endDelay
properties.description: `AnimationEffect`'s end delay.

properties.name: iterationStart
properties.description: `AnimationEffect`'s iteration start.

properties.name: iterations
properties.description: `AnimationEffect`'s iterations. Omitted if the value is infinite.

properties.name: duration
properties.description:
`AnimationEffect`'s iteration duration.
Milliseconds for time based animations and
percentage [0 - 100] for scroll driven animations
(i.e. when viewOrScrollTimeline exists).

properties.name: direction
properties.description: `AnimationEffect`'s playback direction.

properties.name: fill
properties.description: `AnimationEffect`'s fill mode.

properties.name: backendNodeId
properties.description: `AnimationEffect`'s target node.

properties.name: keyframesRule
properties.description: `AnimationEffect`'s keyframes.

properties.name: easing
properties.description: `AnimationEffect`'s timing function.

types.description: Keyframes Rule

properties.name: name
properties.description: CSS keyframed animation's name.

properties.name: keyframes
properties.description: List of animation keyframes.

types.description: Keyframe Style

properties.name: offset
properties.description: Keyframe's time offset.

properties.name: easing
properties.description: `AnimationEffect`'s timing function.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables animation domain notifications.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables animation domain notifications.

commands.name: getCurrentTime
commands.description: Returns the current time of the an animation.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of animation.

commands.name: getPlaybackRate
commands.description: Gets the playback rate of the document timeline.

returns.name: playbackRate
returns.description: Playback rate for animations on page.

commands.name: releaseAnimations
commands.description: Releases a set of animations to no longer be manipulated.

parameters.name: animations
parameters.description: List of animation ids to seek.

commands.name: resolveAnimation
commands.description: Gets the remote object of the Animation.

parameters.name: animationId
parameters.description: Animation id.

commands.name: seekAnimations
commands.description: Seek a set of animations to a particular time within each animation.

parameters.name: animations
parameters.description: List of animation ids to seek.

parameters.name: currentTime
parameters.description: Set the current time of each animation.

commands.name: setPaused
commands.description: Sets the paused state of a set of animations.

parameters.name: animations
parameters.description: Animations to set the pause state of.

parameters.name: paused
parameters.description: Paused state to set to.

commands.name: setPlaybackRate
commands.description: Sets the playback rate of the document timeline.

parameters.name: playbackRate
parameters.description: Playback rate for animations on page

commands.name: setTiming
commands.description: Sets the timing of an animation node.

parameters.name: animationId
parameters.description: Animation id.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration of the animation.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Delay of the animation.

events.name: animationCanceled
events.description: Event for when an animation has been cancelled.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the animation that was cancelled.

events.name: animationCreated
events.description: Event for each animation that has been created.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the animation that was created.

events.name: animationStarted
events.description: Event for animation that has been started.

parameters.name: animation
parameters.description: Animation that was started.

events.name: animationUpdated
events.description: Event for animation that has been updated.

parameters.name: animation
parameters.description: Animation that was updated.

domains.description: Audits domain allows investigation of page violations and possible improvements.

types.description: Information about a cookie that is affected by an inspector issue.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The following three properties uniquely identify a cookie

types.description: Information about a request that is affected by an inspector issue.

properties.name: requestId
properties.description: The unique request id.

types.description: Information about the frame affected by an inspector issue.
Represents the category of insight that a cookie issue falls under.
Information about the suggested solution to a cookie issue.

properties.name: tableEntryUrl
properties.description: Link to table entry in third-party cookie migration readiness list.

types.description:
This information is currently necessary, as the front-end has a difficult
time finding a specific cookie. With this, we can convey specific error
information without the cookie.

properties.name: cookie
properties.description:
If AffectedCookie is not set then rawCookieLine contains the raw
Set-Cookie header string. This hints at a problem where the
cookie line is syntactically or semantically malformed in a way
that no valid cookie could be created.

properties.name: operation
properties.description:
Optionally identifies the site-for-cookies and the cookie url, which
may be used by the front-end as additional context.

properties.name: insight
properties.description: The recommended solution to the issue.

types.description: Details for a performance issue.

properties.name: resourceType
properties.description:
The type of resource causing the mixed content issue (css, js, iframe,
form,...). Marked as optional because it is mapped to from
blink::mojom::RequestContextType, which will be replaced
by network::mojom::RequestDestination

properties.name: resolutionStatus
properties.description: The way the mixed content issue is being resolved.

properties.name: insecureURL
properties.description: The unsafe http url causing the mixed content issue.

properties.name: mainResourceURL
properties.description: The url responsible for the call to an unsafe url.

properties.name: request
properties.description:
The mixed content request.
Does not always exist (e.g. for unsafe form submission urls).

properties.name: frame
properties.description: Optional because not every mixed content issue is necessarily linked to a frame.

types.description:
Enum indicating the reason a response has been blocked. These reasons are
refinements of the net error BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.

Details for a request that has been blocked with the BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE
code. Currently only used for COEP/COOP, but may be extended to include
some CSP errors in the future.

properties.name: resolution
properties.description: The resolution status, either blocking the content or warning.

properties.name: reason
properties.description: The reason the ad was blocked, total network or cpu or peak cpu.

properties.name: frame
properties.description: The frame that was blocked.

properties.name: blockedURL
properties.description: The url not included in allowed sources.

properties.name: violatedDirective
properties.description: Specific directive that is violated, causing the CSP issue.

types.description:
Details for a issue arising from an SAB being instantiated in, or
transferred to a context that is not cross-origin isolated.

Details for a CORS related issue, e.g. a warning or error related to
CORS RFC1918 enforcement.

Details for issues around "Attribution Reporting API" usage.
Explainer: https://github.com/WICG/attribution-reporting-api

Details for issues about documents in Quirks Mode
or Limited Quirks Mode that affects page layouting.

properties.name: isLimitedQuirksMode
properties.description:
If false, it means the document's mode is "quirks"
instead of "limited-quirks".

types.description: Depending on the concrete errorType, different properties are set.

properties.name: errorType
properties.description: Issues with the same errorType are aggregated in the frontend.

types.description:
This issue tracks information needed to print a deprecation message.
https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:third_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/third_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/deprecation/README.md

properties.name: type
properties.description: One of the deprecation names from third_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/deprecation/deprecation.json5

types.description:
This issue warns about sites in the redirect chain of a finished navigation
that may be flagged as trackers and have their state cleared if they don't
receive a user interaction. Note that in this context 'site' means eTLD+1.
For example, if the URL `https://example.test:80/bounce` was in the
redirect chain, the site reported would be `example.test`.

This issue warns about third-party sites that are accessing cookies on the
current page, and have been permitted due to having a global metadata grant.
Note that in this context 'site' means eTLD+1. For example, if the URL
`https://example.test:80/web_page` was accessing cookies, the site reported
would be `example.test`.

Represents the failure reason when a federated authentication reason fails.
Should be updated alongside RequestIdTokenStatus in
third_party/blink/public/mojom/devtools/inspector_issue.mojom to include
all cases except for success.

Represents the failure reason when a getUserInfo() call fails.
Should be updated alongside FederatedAuthUserInfoRequestResult in
third_party/blink/public/mojom/devtools/inspector_issue.mojom.

This issue tracks client hints related issues. It's used to deprecate old
features, encourage the use of new ones, and provide general guidance.

properties.name: url
properties.description: The URL that failed to load.

properties.name: failureMessage
properties.description: The failure message for the failed request.

properties.name: url
properties.description: The BlobURL that failed to load.

properties.name: partitioningBlobURLInfo
properties.description: Additional information about the Partitioning Blob URL issue.

types.description: This issue warns about errors in the select or summary element content model.
This issue warns when a referenced stylesheet couldn't be loaded.

properties.name: sourceCodeLocation
properties.description: Source code position that referenced the failing stylesheet.

properties.name: styleSheetLoadingIssueReason
properties.description: Reason why the stylesheet couldn't be loaded.

properties.name: failedRequestInfo
properties.description: Contains additional info when the failure was due to a request.

types.description:
This issue warns about errors in property rules that lead to property
registrations being ignored.

properties.name: sourceCodeLocation
properties.description: Source code position of the property rule.

properties.name: propertyRuleIssueReason
properties.description: Reason why the property rule was discarded.

properties.name: propertyValue
properties.description: The value of the property rule property that failed to parse

types.description:
This issue warns about uses of APIs that may be considered misuse to
re-identify users.

properties.name: request
properties.description: Applies to BlockedFrameNavigation and BlockedSubresource issue types.

properties.name: sourceCodeLocation
properties.description: Applies to NoisedCanvasReadback issue type.

types.description: This issue warns about improper usage of the <permission> element.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The value of the type attribute.

properties.name: nodeId
properties.description: The node ID of the <permission> element.

properties.name: isWarning
properties.description: True if the issue is a warning, false if it is an error.

properties.name: permissionName
properties.description:
Fields for message construction:
Used for messages that reference a specific permission name

properties.name: occluderNodeInfo
properties.description: Used for messages about occlusion

properties.name: occluderParentNodeInfo
properties.description: Used for messages about occluder's parent

properties.name: disableReason
properties.description: Used for messages about activation disabled reason

types.description:
The issue warns about blocked calls to privacy sensitive APIs via the
Selective Permissions Intervention.

properties.name: apiName
properties.description: Which API was intervened on.

properties.name: adAncestry
properties.description: Why the ad script using the API is considered an ad.

properties.name: stackTrace
properties.description: The stack trace at the time of the intervention.

types.description:
A unique identifier for the type of issue. Each type may use one of the
optional fields in InspectorIssueDetails to convey more specific
information about the kind of issue.

This struct holds a list of optional fields with additional information
specific to the kind of issue. When adding a new issue code, please also
add a new optional field to this type.

A unique id for a DevTools inspector issue. Allows other entities (e.g.
exceptions, CDP message, console messages, etc.) to reference an issue.
An inspector issue reported from the back-end.

properties.name: issueId
properties.description:
A unique id for this issue. May be omitted if no other entity (e.g.
exception, CDP message, etc.) is referencing this issue.

commands.name: getEncodedResponse
commands.description:
Returns the response body and size if it were re-encoded with the specified settings. Only
applies to images.

parameters.name: requestId
parameters.description: Identifier of the network request to get content for.

parameters.name: encoding
parameters.description: The encoding to use.

parameters.name: quality
parameters.description: The quality of the encoding (0-1). (defaults to 1)

parameters.name: sizeOnly
parameters.description: Whether to only return the size information (defaults to false).

returns.name: body
returns.description: The encoded body as a base64 string. Omitted if sizeOnly is true. (Encoded as a base64 string when passed over JSON)

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables issues domain, prevents further issues from being reported to the client.

commands.name: enable
commands.description:
Enables issues domain, sends the issues collected so far to the client by means of the
`issueAdded` event.

commands.name: checkFormsIssues
commands.description:
Runs the form issues check for the target page. Found issues are reported
using Audits.issueAdded event.

domains.description: Defines commands and events for Autofill.

properties.name: number
properties.description: 16-digit credit card number.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the credit card owner.

properties.name: expiryMonth
properties.description: 2-digit expiry month.

properties.name: expiryYear
properties.description: 4-digit expiry year.

properties.name: cvc
properties.description: 3-digit card verification code.

properties.name: name
properties.description:
address field name, for example GIVEN_NAME.
The full list of supported field names:
https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:components/autofill/core/browser/field_types.cc;l=38

properties.name: value
properties.description: address field value, for example Jon Doe.

types.description: A list of address fields.

properties.name: fields
properties.description: fields and values defining an address.

types.description:
Defines how an address can be displayed like in chrome://settings/addresses.
Address UI is a two dimensional array, each inner array is an "address information line", and when rendered in a UI surface should be displayed as such.
The following address UI for instance:
[[{name: "GIVE_NAME", value: "Jon"}, {name: "FAMILY_NAME", value: "Doe"}], [{name: "CITY", value: "Munich"}, {name: "ZIP", value: "81456"}]]
should allow the receiver to render:
Jon Doe
Munich 81456

properties.name: addressFields
properties.description: A two dimension array containing the representation of values from an address profile.

types.description: Specified whether a filled field was done so by using the html autocomplete attribute or autofill heuristics.

properties.name: htmlType
properties.description: The type of the field, e.g text, password etc.

properties.name: id
properties.description: the html id

properties.name: name
properties.description: the html name

properties.name: value
properties.description: the field value

properties.name: autofillType
properties.description: The actual field type, e.g FAMILY_NAME

properties.name: fillingStrategy
properties.description: The filling strategy

properties.name: frameId
properties.description: The frame the field belongs to

properties.name: fieldId
properties.description: The form field's DOM node

events.name: addressFormFilled
events.description: Emitted when an address form is filled.

parameters.name: filledFields
parameters.description: Information about the fields that were filled

parameters.name: addressUi
parameters.description:
An UI representation of the address used to fill the form.
Consists of a 2D array where each child represents an address/profile line.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description:
Trigger autofill on a form identified by the fieldId.
If the field and related form cannot be autofilled, returns an error.

parameters.name: fieldId
parameters.description: Identifies a field that serves as an anchor for autofill.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: Identifies the frame that field belongs to.

parameters.name: card
parameters.description: Credit card information to fill out the form. Credit card data is not saved.  Mutually exclusive with `address`.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Address to fill out the form. Address data is not saved. Mutually exclusive with `card`.

commands.name: setAddresses
commands.description: Set addresses so that developers can verify their forms implementation.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables autofill domain notifications.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables autofill domain notifications.

domains.description: Defines events for background web platform features.

types.description:
The Background Service that will be associated with the commands/events.
Every Background Service operates independently, but they share the same
API.
A key-value pair for additional event information to pass along.

properties.name: timestamp
properties.description: Timestamp of the event (in seconds).

properties.name: origin
properties.description: The origin this event belongs to.

properties.name: serviceWorkerRegistrationId
properties.description: The Service Worker ID that initiated the event.

properties.name: service
properties.description: The Background Service this event belongs to.

properties.name: eventName
properties.description: A description of the event.

properties.name: instanceId
properties.description: An identifier that groups related events together.

properties.name: eventMetadata
properties.description: A list of event-specific information.

properties.name: storageKey
properties.description: Storage key this event belongs to.

commands.name: startObserving
commands.description: Enables event updates for the service.
